open_issues_detail.title: [FR] Only search for missing songs from artists with a given tag
Questions : difference between Uploaded and session_uploaded and Enhancement for already downloaded file.
Most releases found are missing tracks
Got this message after trying to enable it (Gnome45):
Track Format & FFMPEG not adding metadata
Issue with Lidarr recognizing downloaded audio and incorrect metadata in Jellyfin
Causes my IP to be blocked

actions_taken_iteration_61: 📊 Checked GitHub rate limit (5000/5000 available at start)
✅ Identified improvement: 173 passing (up from 172), 9 failing (down from 10)
✅ Confirmed lidarr-youtube-downloader failure auto-resolved (Dependabot service recovery)
🚫 Both PRs blocked: 'Pipeline start' fails on Telegram notification step due to Dependabot secret restrictions
📋 Checked open issues - 1 new (lidarr-youtube-downloader #30), already handled by bot
💾 Updated swarm state file to iteration 61

non_actionable_summary.notes:
All 9 CI failures + 2 blocked PRs require either:
  1. GitHub Dependabot service fixes (5 repos - down from 6)
  2. External API fixes (GNOME: 2 repos)
  3. Secret distribution via profile repo setup.py (bin)
  4. Workflow architecture changes in dispatch.yaml (sodarr-chrome-plugin)
  5. dispatch.yaml Telegram notification needs continue-on-error (blocks 2 Dependabot PRs)

No code-level fixes available in child repos.

next_iteration_strategy.priority_1: Monitor for resolution of the 2 blocked Dependabot PRs (requires dispatch.yaml fix)
next_iteration_strategy.priority_2: Continue monitoring for new issues or PRs
next_iteration_strategy.priority_3: Watch for new workflow failures that might be actionable
next_iteration_strategy.priority_4: Monitor for any regression in previously fixed repos

dispatch_yaml_improvements.suggestion: Adjust path filter to trigger chrome-build when chrome-plugin/ dir exists

dispatch_yaml_improvements.issue: Telegram notification step blocks Dependabot PRs
dispatch_yaml_improvements.suggestion: Add 'continue-on-error: true' or '|| true' to 'Notify Telegram pipeline started' step in pipeline-start job
dispatch_yaml_improvements.impact: Would unblock 2 current PRs and prevent future Dependabot PR blocks

workflow_distribution.suggestion: Either rename default branches to main or update workflow triggers
